f2p_gates.description: resume.go no longer references resumeMultipleCheckpoints or deduplicateSessions (function bodies + call sites both removed). Buggy baseline 2 + 2 references; canonical 0 + 0. Comments stripped before grep so a stale doc comment can't satisfy the gate.

A new helper that picks the latest checkpoint by CreatedAt is defined and called in resume.go (≥2 references). Implementation-agnostic regex accepts any '(resolve|pick|select|find|get)*latest*checkpoint' identifier; canonical exact name resolveLatestCheckpoint also accepted.

User-visible 'older checkpoints skipped' info message present (≥2 occurrences across resume.go printf + integration_test/resume_test.go assertion). The plan calls out this exact wording; canonical patch adds 1 in resume.go and 2 in the integration test.
resume_test.go no longer contains TestDeduplicateSessions (the 5 dedup subtests are gone since the helper itself is removed). Buggy baseline=1; canonical=0. Comments stripped first.

resume_test.go gained a unit test for the latest-checkpoint resolver (any function matching ^func\s+Test[A-Za-z_]*[Ll]atest[A-Za-z_]*[Cc]heckpoint). Buggy=0; canonical=1 (TestResolveLatestCheckpoint).

integration_test/resume_test.go's squash-merge test no longer asserts 'Restored 2 sessions' (multi-session restore). Counts the literal across the file; buggy=2; canonical=1 (one unrelated test legitimately keeps the literal). Pass if ≤1.

p2p_gates.description: go build ./cmd/entire/... succeeds — informational only per CLAUDE.md, never zeros reward.
resume.go + resume_test.go + integration_test/resume_test.go still exist — informational only.

notes: Replaces SWE-rebench stub (was scoring ≥0.99 — empty FAIL_TO_PASS triggered the 'overall pass rate' fallback, which was uniformly high regardless of agent work). New gates target the canonical squash-merge resume collapse (entireio/cli #594-followup): replace multi-checkpoint restore with single-resume from newest checkpoint. Validated locally: clone https://github.com/entireio/cli at parent commit 78bd0e3d, evaluate gate logic against buggy baseline → 0.000; apply canonical patch (data-pipeline/artifacts_cli/canonical_patches/cf32cb7d-e69d-4fde-838f-a801d52d6b92.json, fidelity=exact, 3 files / +91/-270) → 1.000. Partial-fix probe (only resume.go side, tests untouched) → 0.400 — graceful partial credit. Anti-overfit: F2P_RESOLVE_LATEST_ADDED accepts any synonym verb (resolve/pick/select/find/get) for the helper name; F2P_LATEST_CHECKPOINT_TEST is regex-based on function name shape, not exact name. F2P_DEAD_HELPERS_REMOVED + F2P_DEDUP_TEST_REMOVED + F2P_INTEG_ASSERT_FLIPPED strip Go comments before grep so a leftover doc comment can't satisfy a 'removed' gate. Both P2P gates are informational only.
